title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Blue Star India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Blue Star India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
